description: Leviticus — skills registry. Tracks demonstrated capabilities per agent type, updated at sunset. The Prophet queries this before spawning to reuse agents with proven skills.

schema.skill: string — what capability was demonstrated (e.g. 'codebase research', 'API documentation')
schema.firstDemonstrated: ISO timestamp — when this skill was first proven
schema.mandateCount: number — how many mandates have exercised this skill
schema.lastUsed: ISO timestamp — most recent mandate using this skill
schema.confidenceNote: string — any notes on reliability of this skill

note: Updated by agents at sunset. The Prophet reads this before proposing spawn plans — if an existing agent type has demonstrated the needed skill, reuse rather than spawn fresh.
